Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Zenith Blade]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 1''' — The Zenith Blade can hack into processors or take over ships remotely.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 12''' — The Zenith Blade is an artifact that was found by Solstice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 12''' — Aila used the Zenith Blade to strike.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — The Pilot had been waiting to challenge the Zenith Blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — The Zenith Blade can magnify Combat Arts and has an unpredictable ability.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — A Zenith Blade is drifting in space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 15''' — The Zenith Blade was seized by Nova-Bots.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 16''' — The bearer of the Zenith Blade is not restricted by Solstice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — The Zenith Blade is an object whose location is unknown.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 20''' — The Zenith Blade is a potential target of incoming fire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 23''' — The Zenith Blade is a broad silver sword with a straight blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 28''' — The Zenith Blade is associated with Aila Escalon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 30''' — The Zenith Blade broke into the ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — Sola held her own against the Zenith Blade with support from her crewmates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 42''' — Jak's mother possesses the Zenith Blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 43''' — The Zenith Blade emits orange light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 44''' — The Zenith Blade is a highly dangerous entity or weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 45''' — The Zenith Blade is an artifact being used by an enemy in orbit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 46''' — The Zenith Blade was used by Aila as cover.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 47''' — The Zenith Blade is a sentient or communicative artifact.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 47''' — The Zenith Blade is a blade that Aila taps the hilt of.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 49''' — The Zenith Blade is held by a bearer who was fighting.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
